title: Runbook - Associate Players with Emails

message: Admins can issue or update player login identities from the player logins admin workflow when member access needs to be granted.
content:
Runbook - Associate Players with Emails

Summary

Link approved players to member email identities so they can access authenticated features.

Current State

Admins can issue or update player login identities from the player logins admin workflow when member access needs to be granted.

Status

Active

Owner

Unassigned

Owning Area

Player Ops

Prerequisites

  • Admin access to the Next.js application.
  • The member email address and intended player profile are already known.

Procedure

  1. Open the Player logins admin page.
  2. Locate the target player or create the missing player login identity.
  3. Associate the correct email address with the player record and save the change.
  4. Confirm the member can authenticate and that the linked player profile appears correctly.

Notes

  • Use this when a member account exists but is not yet connected to the correct player profile.
  • Changes are made in the Next.js admin flow; Confluence should mirror the operational procedure only.
